title: PcapngWriter leaks file handle on init failure
description: pcap.py __init__ opens file then calls _write_section_header_block() and _write_interface_description_block(). If either raises, file handle leaks. Wrap in try/except/finally or defer open to __enter__.
close_reason: PcapngWriter.__init__ wraps header-block writes in try/except that closes the handle and re-raises on failure (pcap.py). Test: test_closes_file_on_init_failure asserts the file object is closed.
